name: NTU-Fi HAR and Human-ID
summary: Paired Atheros-platform benchmarks for six-class human activity recognition and gait-based identification of fourteen people.

settings.scenario: Segmented activities and gait identity recordings

original.license: Processed benchmark access via linked cloud storage; verify dataset terms

standardization.notes: Published benchmark representation is amplitude-only; do not imply that raw complex CSI is available.
